demo.title: sleuth.sh
demo.code:
# 1. Discover the live endpoints (free, no key)
curl https://app.sleuthagent.ai/x402/openai-bnkr.json

# 2. Call any endpoint — USDC or SLEUTH on Base only, hard max $1/call.
#    Always cap authorization at $1 (and never pass -y — the payment prompt is the confirmation):
bankr x402 call https://x402.bankr.bot/0x08e82839e1513023d115451babc0ff18eda8f925/run-investigation \
  -X POST --max-payment 1 \
  -d '{"conversation_id":"<uuid>","query":"Who are the insiders of $VIRTUAL?"}'

setup: No install required — every endpoint is plain HTTP behind x402 (no account; validate every 402 against the pinned invariants in SKILL.md)
TypeScript: `npm install x402-fetch` — Python: use the Bankr CLI (`bankr x402 call`)
Create a DEDICATED low-value wallet on Base and fund it with only what you intend to spend (~$1–5) in USDC or SLEUTH — never point a main wallet at a paid skill
Payments are USDC or SLEUTH on Base only, hard max $1 per call — reject any 402 asking for a different chain, token, payee, or amount
Discover live endpoints: GET https://app.sleuthagent.ai/x402/openai-bnkr.json (free, no key)
